name: Leper Seeking Cleansing
oracleText:
When Leper Seeking Cleansing enters the battlefield, you gain 2 life.
Whenever you gain life, remove a counter from target permanent you control.
flavorText: "Lord, if thou wilt, thou canst make me clean." — Matthew 8:2
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Healing of the Lepers at Capernaum" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Healing of the Lepers at Capernaum
classics.sourceNotes: This is the most direct cleansing-of-the-leper scene in the set.
